title: COVID-19 SCAN Molecular Workflow
author: Lea Starita
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bebkjakw

steps.title: Aliquot samples from the original upper...
steps.instruction: Aliquot samples from the original upper respiratory sample found in Universal Transport Medium and transfer into barcoded matrix tubes (Thermo).

steps.title: Transfer 200 µL of sample to...
steps.instruction: Transfer 200 µL of sample to the extraction plate and store the remainder of sample in -80 °C .

steps.title: Extract total nucleic acids using the...
steps.instruction: Extract total nucleic acids using the Magna Pure 96 automated extractor using the DNA and Viral NA Small Volume Kit (Roche).

steps.title: Place and hold extracted nucleic acids...
steps.instruction: Place and hold extracted nucleic acids On ice for the remainder of steps in the protocol.

steps.title: Using a 96-well pipettor (Liquidator, Rainin),...
steps.instruction: Using a 96-well pipettor (Liquidator, Rainin), load 5 µL of extracted nucleic acids into Taqman assays in quadruplicate into a 384 well plate containing SARS-CoV-2 and RNaseP RT-PCR reactions master mixes: Layout of the plate for the assay

steps.title: Master mix for S target
steps.instruction: Master mix for S target: load into rows A, C, E, G, I, K, M, O using a Mantis liquid dispenser (Formulatrix) in a dead air hood: Master Mix Component 1: 1x TaqPath 1 step RT-qPCR master mix (A15300) Master Mix Component 2: 1x SARS-CoV-2 assay with a FAM fluor (4332079 assay # APXGVC4) Master Mix Component 3: RNaseP assay with VIC fluor (A30064)

steps.title: Master mix for Orf1B target
steps.instruction: Master mix for Orf1B target: load into rows B, D, F, H, J, L, N, P using a Mantis liquid dispenser (Formulatrix) in a dead air hood: Master Mix Component 1: 1x TaqPath 1 step RT-qPCR master mix (A15300) Master Mix Component 2: 1X SARS-CoV-2 assay with a FAM fluor (4332079 assay # APGZJKF) Master MIx Component 3: RNaseP assay with VIC fluor (A30064)

steps.title: Load positive control DNA into 2...
steps.instruction: Load positive control DNA into 2 positive control wells for each target and add water to the 4 no template control wells.

steps.title: Seal plate with a clear adhesive (Bio-Rad MSB1001)
steps.instruction: Seal plate with a clear adhesive (Bio-Rad MSB1001).

steps.title: Perform RT-PCR on QuantStudio 6 (Applied...
steps.instruction: Perform RT-PCR on QuantStudio 6 (Applied Biosystems) on the Fast setting according to manufacturer instruction.
